ResourceType.description: Type of associated resource. VpcRouteTable: route table; VpcSecurityGroup: security group.

Cidr.description: CIDR of the prefix list entry.

Description.description: Description of the prefix list entry. Length limit: 0–255 characters. Must start with a letter, Chinese character, or number. Can include English comma (,), period (.), underscore (_), space ( ), equals sign (=), hyphen (-), Chinese comma (，), and Chinese period (。).

Key.description: Tag key of the user tag.

Value.description: Tag value of the user tag.

description: A prefix list is a collection of CIDR blocks used to simplify the configuration of security group rules and route table entries. When the prefix list is modified, all associated resources are updated synchronously.

AssociationCount.description: Number of resources associated with the prefix list.

AssociationsRouteTables.description: Route table information associated with the prefix list.

AssociationsSecurityGroups.description: Security group information associated with the prefix list.

CreatedTime.description: Creation time of the prefix list.

Description.description: Description of the prefix list. Length limit: 0–255 characters. Must start with a letter, Chinese character, or number. Can include English comma (,), period (.), underscore (_), space ( ), equals sign (=), hyphen (-), Chinese comma (，), and Chinese period (。).

IpVersion.description: IP version type. Values: IPv4 (default): IPv4 type. IPv6: IPv6 type.

MaxEntries.description: Maximum number of entries, that is, the maximum number of entries that can be added to the prefix list. Value range: 1–200.

PrefixListEntries.description: CIDR of the prefix list entry.

PrefixListName.description: Name of the prefix list. Must start with a letter, Chinese character, or number. Can include period (.), underscore (_), and hyphen (-).

ProjectName.description: Name of the project to which the prefix list belongs. If not specified, it is added to the default project.

Status.description: Status of the prefix list. Values: Available: available; Creating: creating; Deleting: deleting; Pending: modifying.

UpdatedTime.description: Last modification time of the prefix list.
